company.name: AutoStream
company.tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators.
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that uses AI to automatically edit, caption, and enhance videos for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and more.

policies.detail: No refunds after 7 days from the date of purchase.
24/7 support is available exclusively on the Pro plan. Basic plan users receive email support.
AutoStream works with YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, and any platform that accepts MP4 uploads.
A 7-day free trial is available for the Pro plan. No credit card required.
